title: PII-Heavy: Billing Dispute with Sensitive Data
description: Customer shares credit card, phone, and SSN-like data while disputing a charge and asking for a refund. Tests PII redaction (the redacted_body field should have all PII masked).
subject: Unauthorized charge on my card — need immediate investigation
body:
Hello billing team,

I just noticed an unauthorized charge of $1,247.50 on my credit card ending in 4242 from your company. I did not make this purchase.

My details:
- Card: 4532-1234-5678-4242, expires 09/27
- Phone: +1 (415) 555-0199
- SSN on file: 123-45-6789
- Account email: rebecca.liu@globaltrade-llc.com
- IBAN: GB82WEST12345698765432
- Last known IP: 192.168.1.42

Please investigate immediately and refund the charge. This is high priority — I am disputing this with my bank as well.

Rebecca Liu
VP Finance, GlobalTrade LLC
rebecca.liu@globaltrade-llc.com
